hard_stops.logic: fund information is required before distribution calculations can proceed
distribution waterfall calculation contains errors — cannot distribute until reconciled
required tax withholding is missing for one or more investors — regulatory violation

soft_flags.logic: preferred return is accruing unpaid — investors are owed cumulative preferred
available cash is insufficient to cover the calculated distribution — shortfall exists
capital account balances show variance exceeding $100 — reconciliation needed
ERISA-subject investors are affected by this distribution — special compliance rules apply
